description: World's second-largest memory chip manufacturer. Leader in HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) with 50%+ market share. Produces DRAM and NAND flash memory for AI, data centers, and consumer electronics.

_externalRelationships.notes: 50%+ HBM market share through 2026. 70% HBM4 share for NVIDIA Rubin platform. Bank of America 'Top Pick'. Market cap +311% in 1 year.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, Stock Analysis, CompaniesMarketCap, SK Hynix News
_metadata.notes: World's 23rd most valuable company. Memory supercycle driven by AI. UBS predicts 70% HBM4 market share.
